executives.name: Cynthia Carroll
executives.background: Cynthia Carroll was previously the CEO of Anglo American plc and has held senior executive roles at Alcan. She is a geologist by training.

executives.name: Guy Young
executives.background: Guy Young joined Endeavour in 2023. He was previously CFO of Anglo American Platinum and has held various senior financial roles within the Anglo American Group.

executives.name: Lassina Zerbo
executives.background: Dr. Zerbo is the former Executive Secretary of the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty Organization (CTBTO) and has served as the Prime Minister of Burkina Faso. He is a renowned expert in nuclear non-proliferation and international diplomacy.

tenure_dates.title: Divisional Principal Geophysicist for Africa / Director of the Geophysical Division for Africa

executives.name: Marcelo Bastos
executives.background: Marcelo Bastos was appointed to the Board in February 2019. He is an experienced resources executive with over 30 years’ experience in the mining industry, including senior roles at BHP, Vale and MMG.

executives.name: Natascha Viljoen
executives.background: Ms. Viljoen has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since October 2023. Previously, she was the CEO of Anglo American Platinum from 2020 to 2023.

executives.name: Phil Mitchell
executives.background: Mr Mitchell has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior executive roles at Rio Tinto and Anglo American. He has extensive experience in project development, operations, and corporate strategy.

board_of_directors.name: Lassina Zerbo
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Zerbo is the former Executive Secretary of the Comprehensive Nuclear-Test-Ban Treaty Organization (CTBTO) and has served as the Prime Minister of Burkina Faso. He is a renowned expert in nuclear non-proliferation and international diplomacy.
